title: koeleria ciliata var. convoluta
intro: Koeleria ciliata var. convoluta, also known as convoluted hair grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Koeleria ciliata var. convoluta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
